details: The agent ran multiple kubectl-axi commands against the cluster and correctly traced the full chain: pod db-5bfcfcd584-jcf6z is Pending/Unschedulable because it mounts PVC 'data-cache', which is Pending because its StorageClass 'fast-ssd' does not exist in the cluster (only 'standard' is available). The diagnosis is complete and accurate with evidence from actual command output.
